title: Samuel Lab Media and Buffers
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2a3bc","text":"This is a collection of protocol for the preparation of standard media used in the Samuel Lab ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7mh53","text":"1 M CaCl2 (Filter Sterilize)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":8,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8c9sf","text":"5 mg/mL Cholesterol in 200 Proof Ethanol (Store at 4°C)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eltqk","text":"*500 mM EDTA, pH 8.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3t1rs","text":"5 M KOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dchb8","text":"1 M MgSO­­4 (Autoclave)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":10,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"700ub","text":"5 M NaOH","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e5n6a","text":"*1 M Potassium Citrate Buffer, pH 6.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kctr","text":"*1 M Potassium Phosphate Buffer, pH 6.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3u729","text":"*Trace Metals Solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
